source_text: Yea, they deny that they shall attain the Presence of their Lord.”
target_text: Yea, they deny that they shall attain the Presence of their Lord.
source_name: Yea, they deny that they shall attain the Presence of their Lord.”
paragraph_id: Yea, they deny that they shall attain the Presence of their Lord.”
sentence_id: Yea, they deny that they shall attain the Presence of their Lord.”

source_text: انّ البیان جوهر یطلب النّفوذ و الاعتدال
target_text: Human utterance is an essence which aspireth to exert its influence and needeth moderation.

source_text: و هم‌چنین ملاحظه نمائید زمانی که نفحات قدسیّهٴ روح‌ الله خطّهٴ فلسطین و جلیل و سواحل نهر اردن و جوانب اورشلیم را معطّر ساخته و الحان جلیل انجیل بمسامع روحانیان درآمده در آن زمان کلّ قبایل و طوایف آسیا و اروپ و افریک و امریک و اوقیانوس که جزایر بحر محیط است مجوس و بت‌پرست و غافل از خطاب یوم الست بودند.
من تشبّه بقوم فهو منهم
target_text: He who imitates a people is one of them.

source_text: چهار وادی
target_text: The Four Valleys

source_text: و دیگر میفرماید:
target_text: Likewise He saith,

source_text: امور ملّت معلّق است برجال بیت عدل الهی.
target_text: The men of God's House of Justice have been charged with the affairs of the people.

source_text: اخرق حجبات الظّنون و الاوهام لتری شمس العلم مشرقه من هذا الافق المنیر.
target_text: Rend thou asunder the veils of idle fancies and vain imaginings, that thou mayest behold the Daystar of knowledge shining from this resplendent Horizon.

source_text: یا ایّها الغافل
target_text: O heedless one!

source_text: انّه یواجه اهل البهآء بالفرح و الانبساط.
target_text: Such a ruler will, with joy and gladness, turn his face towards, and extend his favors unto, the people of Bahá.

source_text: و سمّیت بهذا الاسم الّذی به لاح نیّر الفضل و اشرقت السّموات و الارضون.
target_text: Be thou glad for this name that hath been conferred upon thee—a name through which the Daystar of grace hath shed its splendor, through which both earth and heaven have been illumined.

source_text: المحیط.
target_text: His authority embraceth all things.

source_text: انّه لا تنقطع عنک لحظات الالطاف.
target_text: The eye of His loving-kindness shall everlastingly be directed towards thee.

source_text: سوف یاخذک الاطمینان بعد الاضطراب.
target_text: The day is approaching when thy agitation will have been transmuted into peace and quiet calm.

source_text: هوالله.
target_text: He is God.

source_text: لوح بافتخار احبّای ایالات مرکزی
target_text: Tablet to the Bahá'ís of the Central States

source_text: لوح بافتخار احبّای ایالات غربی
target_text: Tablet to the Bahá'ís of the Western States

source_text: لوح بافتخار احبّای ایالات متّحده و کانادا
target_text: Tablet to the Bahá'ís of the United States and Canada

source_text: و هم‌چنین میفرماید
target_text: So likewise He saith:

source_text: الهی الهی!
target_text: O God, my God.

source_text: و هر که را بیندازی از خاک پستتر بلکه هیچ از او بهتر.
target_text: and whosoever Thou dost abase is made lower than dust, nay, less than nothing.

source_text: لا اله الّا انت العلیّ الابهی.
target_text: No God is there but Thee, the Most Exalted, the All Glorious.

source_text: فی‌الحقیقه کنز حقیقی از برای انسان علم اوست و اوست علّت عزّت و نعمت و فرح و نشاط و بهجت و انبساط.
target_text: In truth, knowledge is a veritable treasure for man, and a source of glory, of bounty, of joy, of exaltation, of cheer and gladness unto him.

source_text: سبحانک من ان توصف بوصف ما سواک او تعرف بعرفان دونک.
target_text: Exalted art Thou above the description of anyone save Thyself, and the comprehension of aught else except Thee.
